source: Bitcoin / BSV genesis block (height 0). The single-transaction block whose Merkle root equals the coinbase txid. Used to document the single-leaf root convention and the internal↔display byte-order conversion.
notes: BSV/Bitcoin convention: when a block has a single transaction, the block Merkle root equals that transaction's txid. The single-leaf proof has zero siblings; verification consists of asserting leaf == root. Internal byte order is the order in which the bytes are concatenated for hashing; display byte order (block-explorer hex) is the byte-reverse.
